name: Chicken and Rice Avgolemono
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick saucepan, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until they become tender.
2. Add the chicken drumsticks (skinned) to the pan and brown on all sides. Remove the drumsticks with a slotted spoon and set them aside on a plate.
3. Add the chicken broth and rice to the saucepan. Stir gently until the rice is separated from the broth.
4. Return the chicken drumsticks to the saucepan; cover and simmer over low heat for about 15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together the egg substitute, flour, and lemon juice (or fresh lemon juice) until smooth. Set aside.
6. Once the chicken is cooked, add the chopped spinach and dill to the rice mixture. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the rice has absorbed all the liquid from the pan, approximately 5 minutes.
7. Pour in the egg mixture and stir gently until just heated through, about 1 minute.
8. Serve by spooning the rice mixture onto a serving platter. Arrange the cooked chicken drumsticks on top of the rice, then garnish with lemon slices if desired.
Each serving (2 drumsticks plus a scant cup of rice mixture) provides 1/2 Fat, 1 3/4 Carbs, 3 1/4 Protein, 1 Fiber, 25 Vitamin.
